entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A C4 cereal crop studied for its response to water stress and climate change-like conditions.

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A C4 cereal crop studied for its response to water stress and climate change-like conditions.

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A C4 cereal crop studied for its response to water stress and climate change-like conditions.

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION RATE
entities.description: The rate of water loss from plant leaves, denoted as TR.

entities.name: LEAF AREA EXPANSION
entities.description: The process of leaf growth and surface area increase.

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency of water use during transpiration, denoted as TE.

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: Stress resulting from insufficient water availability, including atmospheric and soil water stress.

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE-LIKE CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions that simulate the effects of climate change.

entities.name: VAPOR PRESSURE DEFICIT
entities.description: The difference between the amount of moisture in the air and how much moisture the air can hold when saturated, denoted as VPD.

entities.name: SOIL DRYING
entities.description: The progressive reduction of moisture in the soil.

entities.name: C4 CEREALS
entities.description: Cereals that utilize the C4 photosynthetic pathway for carbon fixation.

entities.name: CONTROLLED CONDITIONS
entities.description: The experimental environment used to measure plant responses to stress.

relationships.description: restricts under high VPD when grown in moderate VPD
reduces transpiration at higher soil moisture than sorghum and pearl millet
